title: SEC Form 4 Insider Cluster Buying Dimension
summary: Add a 10th signal dimension that polls the SEC EDGAR RSS feed (free, no API key required) for Form 4 insider purchase filings on Decifer's watchlist symbols. The signal fires only on 'cluster' conditions — 2+ independent insiders (CEO, CFO, director) purchasing within 10 days — which academic research identifies as the high-conviction subset. Insider selling is explicitly excluded as it has weak predictive power due to diversification/tax motivations.
deferral_reason: Future, requires data pipeline — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
